title: TTRP ETCG
description: Resourcepack Made For Eldoraths Trading Card Game.
body: # 💬 Description This resource pack contains all the essential cards and assets for building your custom ETCG (Eldorath Trading Card Game) decks. Create powerful combinations, strategize with magic, strength, and dexterity, and compete in tournaments with official card collections.\ **Made By F2 And Kaine Ulderwood.** ## • ETCG Discord ## • CIT REQUIRED Click On The Image To Go To The Mod Page! ## • ETCG Card Maker Forum. Click The Image Below And Make It Do You Wish To Make A Player Card For The ETCG? # ❗ Future Updates - Nothin For Now # Card Examples ## Basic Card ![Basic_Card](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Y5gdiIcj/images/c2b383b4c0467b10334ec1727711a6a908e6669b.gif) ## Item Card ![Item_Card](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Y5gdiIcj/images/f1707f81a741383bafcd1d9d319541ecc1b52e4a.gif)
